{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Hall of Elders
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Lindon]] often arrives at the central courtyard outside the [[Hall of Elders]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c4">''Unsouled'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Hall of Elders]] is where the [[Jades]] usually address the rest of the clan.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c11">''Bloodline'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
